name: Doppio (Diavolo) Vinegar | JJBA | JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
description:
He suddenly becomes aware of diavolo and what diavolo has done

Inspired by Animal I Have Become ~ Three Days Grace

~ Lyrics ~

"So what if you can see the darkest side of me?

No one would ever change this animal I have become

Help me believe it's not the real me

Somebody help me tame this animal I have become

Help me believe it's not the real me

Somebody help me tame this animal"

~ ~

CW/TW; (possible) self harm, identity crisis, suicidal intentions in intro, panic attack. These MAY be portrayed as inaccurate and I'm aware of that, I'm not good at writing when it comes to angst 😢

Hey so do you think doppio/diavolo would be like those facebook moms with their phones blasting rlly loudly

just saying
